note: yearonly adds a single `yearonly` field type storing only a year as an integer, with a `yearonly_default` select-list widget and a `yearonly_default` formatter. Per-field range settings are yearonly_from (min year) and yearonly_to (max year: a specific year, `now`, or a PHP relative format like `+5 years`). No admin settings page, no permissions. Recipe cases are response-graded. Medium cases install a known field (range / widget) and require live introspection. Hard cases build a live yearonly field with a specific range, verified against real field storage/config.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I want a field that captures ONLY the year of a date (no month/day/time) and presents editors a dropdown of years. Which contrib module and field type provide this, and what data type is the single value stored as in the database?
evals.expected_output: The Year Only (yearonly) module's `yearonly` field type. It stores a single `value` column of type int (an integer year), with a `yearonly_default` select-list widget for entry.

evals.prompt: For the Drupal yearonly field type, which two field settings define the valid range of selectable years, and what kinds of values can the upper bound take besides a fixed year?
evals.expected_output: yearonly_from (minimum/start year, numeric) and yearonly_to (maximum/end year). yearonly_to may be a specific year, the literal `now` (current year), or a PHP relative format such as `+5 years` or `-1 year`, resolved via strtotime().

evals.prompt: In the Drupal yearonly module, what are the machine ids of the default widget and default formatter for the field, and what single setting does the widget expose?
evals.expected_output: Both the default widget and default formatter use the id `yearonly_default` (widget label 'Select Year', a year select list; formatter label 'Year only', prints the raw year). The widget's one setting is `sort_order` (asc = ascending, default; desc = descending / newest first).

evals.prompt: A Year Only field has been added to the Article content type on this site. Inspect its field configuration and tell me the machine name of the field, its minimum (start) year, and its maximum (end) year setting.
evals.expected_output: The field node.article.field_year_intro (type yearonly) has yearonly_from = 1950 and yearonly_to = now (the current year).

evals.prompt: The Article content type on this site has a Year Only field whose entry widget was customized. Inspect the field and its form display and tell me: which widget it uses and in what order the years are listed in the select box.
evals.expected_output: The field field_year_widget uses the yearonly_default (Select Year) widget on the node.article default form display, with sort_order = desc, so years are listed descending (newest first).

evals.prompt: On this Drupal site, add a Year Only field to the Article content type using the field type provided by the yearonly module. Name it field_eval_year, label it 'Founded year', and configure its range so the minimum selectable year is 1900 and the maximum is the current year (use the module's relative-year keyword for the upper bound). Apply it live so the field and its storage exist on Article nodes.
evals.expected_output: A FieldStorageConfig node.field_eval_year of type `yearonly` and a FieldConfig on node.article referencing it exist, with settings yearonly_from = 1900 and yearonly_to = now (or the numeric current year).

evals.prompt: On this Drupal site, add a Year Only field (yearonly module field type) to the Basic page content type (bundle machine name `page`). Name it field_eval_vintage, label it 'Vintage year', and set its valid range to a minimum year of 1800 and a maximum year of 2000. Apply it live so the field and its storage exist on Basic page nodes.
evals.expected_output: A FieldStorageConfig node.field_eval_vintage of type `yearonly` and a FieldConfig on node.page referencing it exist, with settings yearonly_from = 1800 and yearonly_to = 2000.
